ideation: This animation sequence will represent the trademark symbol's circular motion and emphasis on ownership.  The animation will focus on a circular motion of both arms, starting with them extended outward, then bringing them together in a 'holding' motion before returning to the sides.  This will emphasize the encompassing nature of a trademark.  The movements should be smooth and deliberate, conveying a sense of importance and ownership. The robot arms, lacking elbows, will simulate this circular motion using the shoulder joints, creating a sense of controlled power and precision.

frames.beat: arms sweep wide, claiming the space
arms move inward, a circular embrace begins
the circle continues, enclosing the idea
arms reach out again, completing the sweep
arms settle down, the mark is made
